chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-427 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 09.09.2025 Mr. Shankar Lal Meghwar, Advocate for Petitioner Senior Accounts Officer, HMC, Faheem Khan Dayo present in person Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh ----- Senior Accounts Officer, HMC, files statement on behalf of Respondents No.2 & 4, stating that the pensionary benefits and emoluments amounting to Rs.2,264,336/- shall be paid to the Petitioner in five equal installments starting from October 10, 2025. The statement is taken on record. On this statement, Petitioner’s Counsel is satisfied and seeks disposal of the Petition, which is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
